name: openeventflow
description: End-to-end frontend event collection, streaming, warehousing, and consumption pipeline for large apps.

scripts.test: node --test tools/tracking-plan-cli/tests/*.test.js packages/core/tests/*.test.js packages/web/tests/*.test.js packages/react/tests/*.test.js packages/react-native/tests/*.test.js packages/collector/tests/*.test.js packages/warehouse/tests/*.test.js sdks/tests/*.test.js e2e/tests/*.test.js
scripts.publish:flutter:dry-run:cn: cd sdks/flutter && HOME=/private/tmp PUB_HOSTED_URL=https://pub.flutter-io.cn dart pub publish --dry-run
scripts.verify: npm test && npm run test:mobile && npm run smoke:dbt
